name: virustotal_scan
description: Scans a URL, domain, IP address, file hash, or local file against VirusTotal to check for malware or malicious activity. Requires a VirusTotal API key in config (virustotal.api_key).

parameters.resource: The URL, domain, IP address, or file hash (MD5/SHA1/SHA256) to scan
parameters.file_path: Optional local file path to hash or upload to VirusTotal
parameters.mode: Optional scan mode for local files: auto, hash, or upload

returns: Scan results showing detection ratio and vendor results from VirusTotal
